title: The Wasp Factory
lines: The air here is a thick, suffocating soup of ozone and the cloying scent of rotting nectar. Massive, rusted industrial titans grind and hiss in the gloom, their movements rhythmic and uncaring.
High above, the ceiling is a complex lattice of golden geometric patterns that vibrate with an intense, low-frequency hum. This is a temple to a cold, insectile god.
Vast, translucent honeycombs are draped over the steel rafters like internal organs, dripping a thick, glowing amber ichor onto the cold concrete floor.

options.desc: 1. Venture deeper into the golden hum
2. Search the industrial ruins for loot
